label: Sealed Packet Store
description: Sealed Packet Store serves as the Registry House’s secured storage for docketed bundles, duplicate ledgers, and notarized copies awaiting filing or transport. Salvaged-ashlar walls are fitted with iron-studded shelving and pigeonholes, each face scored with tally marks and wax-stain rings from sealed strings. A low barrel vault and narrow slit-vent keep the space cool and dry, while an interior grille and secondary bolt emphasize controlled access over convenience. Hazard placards and interdiction notices are fixed at eye level beside a sand tray for spilled powder and damped ink.
